case_title: RENITA CURRY VS. VALLEY RELOCATION AND STORAGE OF NORTHERN

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-13-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VALLEY RELOCATION AND STORAGE OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT VALLEY RELOCATION AND STORAGE OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA INC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CURRY, RENITA AS TO DEFENDANT VALLEY RELOCATION AND STORAGE OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CURRY, RENITA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY MARK ROBSON, VICE PRESIDENT. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
